trait.description: Chest pain or discomfort walking normally
trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Health and medical history > Chest pain
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "Do you get this pain or discomfort when you walk at an ordinary pace on the level?" ~F3606~ was collected from participants who indicated that they get pain or discomfort in their chest, as defined by their answers to ~F2335~
